brand.name: UGS HireFlow
brand.design_style: Modern Enterprise SaaS, Glassmorphism, Rounded Cards, Soft Shadows, Smooth Animations, Professional Typography, Responsive

typography.font_setup: Import via Google Fonts in index.css or index.html

rules.anti_default: BANNED: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Lato for Headings. Use Outfit for high-impact headers and Manrope for clean, highly readable data tables.
rules.tracking: Headlines (>32px) MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
rules.labels: Overlines and table labels MUST be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
rules.line_height: Tight (leading-none) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
rules.hierarchy: H1: max text-5xl lg:text-6xl. H2: max text-4xl. Do not exceed these. The jump between a heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

rules.anti_pattern: No generic full-screen gradients. Do not use pure #000000. Use tinted neutrals.
rules.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white). Hover state color must be a lighter hue of ACTIVE state.
rules.ctas: LIMIT the use of PRIMARY color to actual CTAs (buttons, primary forms). Do not blast it everywhere.

glassmorphism.concept: The Crystal/Apple Variant. Must feel like milled crystal, not muddy gray.
glassmorphism.usage: Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, Toasts, Modal Overlays, Auth Cards

visual_enhancers.shadows: Use soft ambient shadows (e.g., shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]) rather than harsh drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the grid occasionally for technical dashboard sections: border-r border-b border-border/40.

component_specs.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or smooth rounded (rounded-lg). Use scale-95 on active. Explicitly style hover states.
component_specs.cards: Rounded cards (12px-16px radius). Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border darkens.
component_specs.status_dots: 8px by 8px rounded-full. Add a 4px transparent ring of the same color for a 'glowing' effect (e.g., bg-emerald-500 ring-4 ring-emerald-500/20).
component_specs.timeline: 2px vertical left border in slate-200 (dark: slate-800). Relative positioned glowing status dots on the line. Right-aligned content blocks.
component_specs.kanban: Horizontal scrollable flex/grid. Glassmorphism column headers. Cards inside have subtle drag-and-drop hover shadows and prominent status dots.
component_specs.data_tables: Dense rows (py-2). Left-aligned. Sticky header with glassmorphism to let rows scroll underneath beautifully.
component_specs.stat_cards: Bento-grid summary style. One large metric (text-4xl), a small trend indicator, and minimal label.
component_specs.empty_states: Centered content. Use Lucide icons sized 48px+ with stroke-width 1. Subtle text, clear primary CTA.
component_specs.tabs: Shadcn default tabs have fixed h-9. Override with h-auto py-2. Use pill-backgrounds for active states.
component_specs.forms: Use Shadcn components. Never use native inputs. No completely transparent backgrounds in dropdowns.

public_landing.structure: Hero (Glassmorphism overlay on image), Bento Grid Features, Social Proof, Dark Footer (py-24, massive brand text).
public_landing.rules: Asymmetric, high visual impact, scroll-triggered effects.

auth_pages.structure: Split screen layout. Left: Brand imagery/3D element with overlay. Right: Clean, centered glassmorphism login/registration form.

admin_dashboard.structure: Collapsible Sidebar Nav, Sticky Top Header (Glassmorphism), Dashboard body using Bento Grid (grid-cols-4).
admin_dashboard.rules: High density, strict hierarchy. <= 3 clicks to any major action.

candidate_workspace.structure: Two-column split (e.g., col-span-3 and col-span-9). Left: Sticky Profile Summary (Photo, Status, Quick Actions). Right: Tabbed interface (Personal, Edu/Exp, Skills, Docs, Interview Timeline, Payments).
candidate_workspace.rules: The heart of the app. Every detail maps back to an emotional 'hired' state. Close-up details, organized.

interview_pipeline.structure: Kanban board layout. Columns mapping to statuses (Registered, Verified, Assigned, Interview, Round 1/2, Tech, HR, Selected).
interview_pipeline.rules: Visual status dots heavily utilized here.

reports_view.structure: Top bar global filters (Date, Department, Status). Grid layout of recharts/shadcn charts.

grids.marketing_tetris: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetric span logic.
grids.dashboard_dense: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.

motion.interactions: Hover states, micro-interactions on button clicks, staggered entrance animations for lists/tables.
motion.banned: transition: all. NEVER USE IT. Use transition-colors, transition-transform.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
accessibility.contrast: Ensure min 4.5:1 contrast for small text. Use text shadow if placing text over images.

media.icons_library: lucide-react (default). Use phosphor-icons for extremely dense dashboards if needed.

image_urls.description: Collaborative business meeting with three professionals focused on a laptop in a modern office.
Contemporary building facade with reflective glass windows in an urban environment.
A close up of a computer screen with a map of the world on it, abstract software tech.

3d_libraries.marketing: framer-motion for basic layer depth and staggered entrances.
3d_libraries.dashboard: recharts (integrated via Shadcn ui charts) for data visualization.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The project uses .js files, NOT .tsx. All generated React code must be written in modern JSX/JS (ES6+), not TypeScript.
Do NOT add TypeScript types or interfaces.
Use Shadcn UI components wherever possible. If running Shadcn CLI is not possible, implement the UI component manually using Tailwind and Radix UI patterns.
Make sure to use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
For toasts, use the Sonner component.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute for automated testing.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for dropdowns, overlays, or headers that have content scrolling under them.
